channel.title: System Design on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in System Design on simeononsecurity

item.title: Software Development Career Playbook: From First Commit to Engineering Lead
item.category: "software development career" , "software engineering" , "career playbook" , "programming" , "developer career" , "career guidance" , "professional development"
item.description: A comprehensive guide to launching, growing, and leading a software development career. Covers programming languages, education paths, job searching, career advancement, and engineering leadership.

item.title: Growing as a Software Developer
item.category: "software developer career growth" , "junior to senior developer" , "open source contributions" , "system design" , "software engineering advancement" , "developer career track"
item.description: How to advance from junior to senior developer, choose your technical track, contribute to open source, and develop system design skills.
